commands.review_summary:
Adds agent-facing issue, PR, and contact-routing guidance to AGENTS.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, and README.md, including links to issue forms, the PR template, Discord/support, SECURITY.md, and .github/CODEOWNERS.

PR surface: Docs +26. Total +26 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a docs/process PR. Source inspection verifies the requested routing map and the previously flagged CODEOWNERS path is corrected on the current PR head.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the prior mechanical CODEOWNERS docs defect is fixed and the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review.

target.title: docs: document agent issue and PR routing
target.body:
Closes #96712

## What Problem This Solves

Fresh coding agents can find `AGENTS.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, the issue forms, `CODEOWNERS`, and the PR template, but the issue/PR/contact routing is spread across those files. That makes it easy for a first-time agent to file the wrong issue shape, omit required evidence, skip the PR template, or guess who to tag.

## Why This Change Was Made

Adds a compact issue/PR/contact routing map to `CONTRIBUTING.md`, a stricter fresh-agent checklist to the `AGENTS.md` GitHub/PR section, and short front-door links in the README Community section. The change only documents existing process primitives: issue forms, blank-issue policy, PR body sections, evidence expectations, Discord/support routing, security routing, maintainer areas, and `CODEOWNERS`.

## User Impact

Agent-authored and AI-assisted contributions get a deterministic path from the README and repo-root process docs for filing bugs, docs bugs, feature requests, support questions, security reports, and PRs. Maintainers should see fewer process-shape mistakes because agents are told where to look, what evidence to include, and when not to guess tags or contacts.

## Evidence

- `pnpm docs:list` (passed; command hydrated dependencies before listing docs)
- `git diff --check`
- `git ls-files CODEOWNERS .github/CODEOWNERS` (returns `.github/CODEOWNERS`)
- `git status -sb` showed only the intended docs files changed before each commit
target.author: 100yenadmin
